# My App

A full-stack web application built with React and Express.

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## API Reference

### Users

- `GET /api/users` - List all users
- `POST /api/users` - Create a new user

MIT

rawInput.content:
# My App

A full-stack web application built with React and Express.

## Getting Started

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## API Reference

### Authentication

- `POST /api/auth/login` - Authenticate user and receive JWT token
- `POST /api/auth/logout` - Invalidate current session
- `POST /api/auth/refresh` - Refresh an expired JWT token
- `POST /api/auth/register` - Register a new user account
- `POST /api/auth/forgot-password` - Request a password reset email
- `POST /api/auth/reset-password` - Reset password using valid token

### Users

- `GET /api/users` - List all users (requires authentication)
- `POST /api/users` - Create a new user
- `GET /api/users/:id` - Get user by ID (requires authentication)
- `PATCH /api/users/:id` - Update user (requires authentication)

## License

MIT

content.text:
I've updated the README.md with documentation for the new authentication API endpoints. Here's what was added:

**New Authentication Section:**
- `POST /api/auth/login` - Authenticate user and receive JWT token
- `POST /api/auth/logout` - Invalidate current session
- `POST /api/auth/refresh` - Refresh an expired JWT token
- `POST /api/auth/register` - Register a new user account
- `POST /api/auth/forgot-password` - Request a password reset email
- `POST /api/auth/reset-password` - Reset password using valid token

**Enhanced User Endpoints:**
- Added authentication requirement notes to existing endpoints
- Added `GET /api/users/:id` and `PATCH /api/users/:id` endpoints

The file was successfully written after you approved the write permission.
